name: The Animal Riddle
focus: Combined animal descriptions - guess the animal
storyIntro: Totoro has some riddles for you! Can you guess each animal?
storyOutro: You solved all the riddles! You really know your animals!

tasks.prompt: I am big. I live in the ocean. I am not a fish. What am I?
tasks.hint: I am the biggest animal in the world!

tasks.prompt: I have feathers. I cannot fly. I live on ice. What am I?
tasks.hint: I walk funny and love the cold!

tasks.prompt: I have no legs. I have scales. I slither. I am a ___.
I am furry. I sleep a lot. I live in trees in Australia. What am I?
tasks.hint: It starts with K and is very cute.

tasks.prompt: The dolphin has feathers and lives in the desert.
I am green. I have big teeth. I live in rivers. What am I?
I can talk! I am ___ and I live in the ___.
tasks.hint: I am a bird with many colors.

tasks.prompt: The kangaroo has wings and flies over Australia.

questions.prompt: A whale lives in the ocean.
An eagle lives in the desert.

tasks.hint: Think about what you know about each animal!

tasks.prompt: This animal lived millions of years ago. You can see its bones in a museum!
tasks.hint: It starts with D and is very old!
